preamble: a whimsical treehouse mansion composed of mismatched architectural styles nestled atop a massive tree trunk with bare winter branches

dropdownSelections.character_substrate_coating: handcrafted model texture with painterly finish
dropdownSelections.environment: elevated fantasy tree platform surrounded by misty gray sky
dropdownSelections.surface_texture: rough bark, smooth siding, and matte painted walls
dropdownSelections.lighting_direction: even side light from frame left
dropdownSelections.color_scheme_primary: warm beige, aged stone blue, and soft crimson
dropdownSelections.color_scheme_secondary: muted brown, slate gray, and chestnut
dropdownSelections.depth_of_field: deep — all structures in crisp focus
dropdownSelections.level_of_detail: maximum — fine architectural and bark texture clarity
dropdownSelections.black_levels: low black levels with soft shadowing
dropdownSelections.environmental_density: medium — focused detail on main structure with minimal surroundings
dropdownSelections.contrast_profile: gentle slope with emphasis on texture over shadow
dropdownSelections.highlight_profile: soft window glow and light roof edge shimmer

Background Options: gray mist backdrop with no ground plane
Composition Aids: horizontal symmetry with vertical balance on tree trunk
Post-Processing: gentle warm filter with fine detail enhancement
